project: AI Powered Smart Living - World's First Agent Based Solution
title: Chytre bydleni postavene na umele inteligenci - celosvetove prvni reseni zalozene na agentech

metadata.agency: Ministry of Industry and Trade of the Czech Republic
metadata.program: Program TWIST - Podprogram 1 „Aplikovany vyzkum ve strategickych oblastech (1. verejna soutez)

english_title.label: English title
english_title.text: AI Powered Smart Living - World's First Agent Based Solution

keywords.label: Keywords
keywords.text: smart home, artificial intelligence, AI agents, automation, semantic model, Loxone, KNX, digitalization, energy efficiency, smart home

abstract.label: Abstract
abstract.text: The project is developing the world's first digital solution (Smart Home AI Suite) that uses interconnected AI agents to automate the key phases of a smart home lifecycle - study, design, and programming. At present, the realization of fully integrated smart homes is time-consuming, expensive, and heavily dependent on highly skilled experts, which limits their availability. The new solution will significantly streamline and reduce the cost of these processes, making smart homes accessible to a wider range of customers and enabling implementation companies to deliver more projects with higher quality. A central component of the project is a semantic model of home behavior that links individual technologies and ensures consistency across lifecycle phases. The platform will be cloud-based, scalable, and support systems such as Loxone and KNX, while its behavior specification module will be universally applicable to other platforms. The project contributes to digitalization and the sustainable development of smart living in the Czech Republic and abroad.
